title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at More Retail Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at More Retail Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
More Retail Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About More Retail Digital Technologies:
More Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Digital Technologies!
